# btpservice Provider

Manages resources across SAP Business Technology Platform services.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    btpservice = {
      source = "SAP/sap-btp-services"
    }
  }
}

provider "btpservice" {
  cicd {
    endpoint      = "https://cicd-service-url.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com"
    token_url     = "https://your-subaccount.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token"
    client_id     = "sb-clone-xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx!b12345|cicd-service!b6789"
    client_secret = "your-client-secret-value-here="
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cicd` (Block, Optional) Configuration for the SAP BTP CI/CD service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--cicd))

<a id="nestedblock--cicd"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cicd`

Optional:

- `client_id` (String) OAuth2 client ID. Env: `SAPBTP_CICD_CLIENT_ID`.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth2 client secret. Env: `SAPBTP_CICD_CLIENT_SECRET`.
- `endpoint` (String) CI/CD service base URL. Env: `SAPBTP_CICD_ENDPOINT`.
- `timeout` (Number) HTTP request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 60.
- `token_url` (String) OAuth2 token endpoint. Env: `SAPBTP_CICD_TOKEN_URL`.
